exampleSentencesTranslated: Many people believe that hell is a place of punishment after death.
He feels like he is living in hell when facing too many difficulties.
If I don't listen, my grandmother often says I will be sent to hell.
notes:
địa ngục means hell — the place of punishment after death in religion.  

It’s a noun and usually uncountable in this meaning (no classifier needed). Often used in contrast with thiên đường (heaven), which helps you remember it.  

It’s also very common in a figurative way: something extremely painful, stressful, or horrible = “hell.”  

Common pairings: xuống địa ngục (go to hell), địa ngục trần gian (hell on earth).
exampleSentences: Nhiều người tin rằng địa ngục là nơi trừng phạt sau khi chết.
Anh cảm thấy như mình đang sống trong địa ngục khi gặp quá nhiều khó khăn.
Nếu em không nghe lời, bà nội thường nói sẽ bị đưa xuống địa ngục.
notes_md:
**địa ngục** means *hell* — the place of punishment after death in religion.  

It’s a noun and usually uncountable in this meaning (no classifier needed). Often used in contrast with **thiên đường** (heaven), which helps you remember it.  

It’s also very common in a figurative way: something extremely painful, stressful, or horrible = “hell.”  

Common pairings: **xuống địa ngục** (go to hell), **địa ngục trần gian** (hell on earth).

definitions.vi: Danh từ chỉ nơi trừng phạt sau khi chết trong tôn giáo; hoặc dùng để chỉ một hoàn cảnh vô cùng đau khổ, tồi tệ.
definitions.en: Hell; the place of punishment after death; a horrible/painful situation.
definitions.es: Infierno; un lugar de castigo o una situación horrible.

example.vi: Sống trong địa ngục trần gian.
example.en: Living in a hell on earth.
example.es: Viviendo en un infierno en la tierra.

content.sentence: Nhiều người tin rằng ___ là nơi trừng phạt sau khi chết.

translation.en: Many people believe that hell is the place of punishment after death.

content.sentence: Anh cảm thấy như mình đang sống trong ___ khi gặp quá nhiều khó khăn.

translation.en: I feel like I am living in hell when facing too many difficulties.
